_purpose: Curated bookmarks rendered on the Browser page. First step toward an in-app browser — for now each card opens the URL in the OS default browser via egui's hyperlink_to. Categories let the operator filter; descriptions explain why each link is here so the page also acts as a reference.
_workflow: Operator opens Browser page → reads category headers → clicks a card → URL opens in their default browser. Future: when in-app browser ships, these same bookmarks load inside an isolated tab with vault-stored credentials.

bookmarks.title: Live site
bookmarks.description: Production HumanityOS — chat, profiles, vault, marketplace.
